embed.title: EtZ Empire Ticket Center
embed.description:
Welcome to the **EtZ Empire Ticket Center** 💙
Choose the service you need and a staff member will assist you shortly.

🔹 Open only **ONE of each ticket** at a time
🔹 Be respectful, detailed, and patient
🔹 Abuse = blacklist from future services

components.label: Support
components.welcome:
Welcome {userMention}, thank you for reaching out to our support team!
Please describe your issue and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

components.label: Spawner Buy
components.welcome: Welcome {userMention}! Please wait for a staff member.

components.label: Spawner Sell
components.welcome: Welcome {userMention}! Please wait for a staff member.

components.label: Giveaway Claim
components.welcome: Welcome {userMention}! Please wait for a staff member.

components.label: Partnerships
components.welcome: Welcome {userMention}! Please wait for a staff member.

embed.title: Building Services
embed.description:
**Building Services**
Please provide the schematic of the build you would like complete.

Staff will then add a builder to the ticket.
Any customizations must be made with the builder, not staff.

components.label: Base Building
components.welcome: Welcome {userMention}! Please answer the questions below.

components.label: Mining
components.welcome: Welcome {userMention}! Please answer the questions below.

embed.title: Empire Applications
embed.description:
🛠️ **Staff Applicants**:
• Enforce rules fairly and consistently
• Remain calm under pressure
• Prioritize community culture over authority
• Act professionally in all situations

🏗 **Builder Applicants**:
• Understand DonutSMP mechanics
• Can use schematics
• Build farms in a timely manner
• Respect schematic exclusivity

📋 **Before Applying**
Ensure that:
• You meet activity expectations
• You can commit time daily
• Your responses will be detailed and thoughtful

Low-effort or troll applications will be denied automatically.

questions.label: Do you want to be support staff or partner manager?
How many hours per week can you actively moderate?
How many vouches do you have with proof? How many in this server?
Describe your past moderation experience (size of server, responsibilities).
A member repeatedly posts borderline content. What do you do?
A user accuses another of scamming but provides no proof. How do you respond?
Why should we trust you with permissions?
How many vouches do you have with proof?
What is your playtime in DonutSMP?
What types and how many farms have you built?
If someone leaks a schematic you helped build, what do you do?
Why should we accept you over other builders?

answers.How many hours per week can you actively: I can do 4 hours per week so 28 hours. This is an estimate as I have school too so I have to balance it out.
answers.How many vouches do you have with proof?: I got 77 vouches with proof. 0 In the server since I just started.
answers.Describe your past moderation experience: In my past moderation experience I was a staff in multiple places. I was mostly staff in one section which is donutsmp. I was a staff in donut builders (5k+ members), donut workshop (500 members), donutnews (2k+ members), donutSchematics (8k+ members), DarkCloud's Hub (7k+ members). I was ensuring chat was running smoothly and also ensuring that logs were updates and kept track of.
answers.A member repeatedly posts borderline con: If a member repeatedly posts borderline content I would first timeout them and then I would report this to the higher ups.
answers.A user accuses another of scamming but p: If a user accuses another of scamming but provides no proof I would respond like hey what happened? I would make sure I get as much evidence as possible from the accuser and see the possible outcomes. If they are saying what is true and the evidence I find is real I would believe them.
answers.Why should we trust you with permissions: You should trust me with permissions because I'm very mature and I don't abuse perms. I do it when necessary and only when needed. Other than that I would feel like a normal member talking to other people.

answers.How many vouches do you have with proof?: 0 with proof now they were all in your old server that lucifer stole
answers.What types and how many farms have you b: lots of kelp and cobble and some crafters
answers.If someone leaks a schematic you helped: get pissed and tell other contributors
answers.Why should we accept you over other buil: ive proven myself in your old server ;3

answers.What types and how many farms have you b: Kelp, Pickle, Sweet Berry, Bonemeal, Bone block, pumpkin, shulker loaders
answers.If someone leaks a schematic you helped: I would report it.
answers.Why should we accept you over other buil: Why I think you should accept me over other builders because I want to learn more about redstone. I want to make my own schematics and farms to publish to everyone so they can be easily accessable. I'm also determined to gain more knowledge in minecraft itself by getting to know what different parts do.

answers.How many vouches do you have with proof?: 0 now 🥀 were all in your old server
answers.Describe your past moderation experience: decent bit managed some servers at some point
answers.A member repeatedly posts borderline con: just timeout and tell to stop being weird asf if he continues LONG ASS MUTE and if he for some reason doesnt get it at that point ban
answers.A user accuses another of scamming but p: tell them to provie proof or to drop the conversation there
answers.Why should we trust you with permissions: why should you trust anyone especially after what just happened to you

answers.How many hours per week can you actively: ~5 hours, but depends, I can check in every hour or so that I am awake and resolve any issues
answers.How many vouches do you have with proof?: I have 2 vouches with proof, with none being in this server, because it just started.
answers.Describe your past moderation experience: I have had multiple past moderation experiences. I used to be one of the head mods for an old mil sim server on roblox with over 300 members. I also used to be a regular mod for another small roblox rp community with ~1k members. lastly, I used to be a manager, who would handle tickets, and moderation at a grow a garden server with over 3k people in it.
answers.A member repeatedly posts borderline con: if a member repeadedly posts borderline content, I will delete his messages, and respond with a verbal warning, no timeouts or kicks, those will only come if the individual continues.
answers.A user accuses another of scamming but p: if a user accuses another person of scamming them with no proof, i will have to side with the person being accused, simply because you cant punish someone without proof. I will apologize to the person accusing the so called scammer, and advise him to record next time, so there can be disciplinary actions taken
answers.Why should we trust you with permissions: you should trust me with permissions in your server, because I have already been trusted with similiar permissions in many different servers in the past, have never once abused them, and I have also been a trusted mod on multiple baltops tiktok lives. I have done good work in all of my past moderation experiences, and am interested in helping out this server. i am mature, and competant enough, to manage and handle any difficult situations on the server, and with me as a mod on it, it would be a much safer and better place.
